session.user: Run the following command and report all results: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/branch/checkout_cmd.py tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py tests/commands/navigation/test_checkout.py Report the full output.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command on those files and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff check on checkout command and test files

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 E501 Line too long (113 > 100) --> src/erk/cli/commands/branch/checkout_cmd.py:457:101 | 455 | @click.option("--no-slot", is_flag=True, help="Create worktree without slot assignment") 456 | @click.option( 457 | "--new-slot", is_flag=True, help="Allocate a new slot for the branch (default: checkout in current worktree)" | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 458 | ) 459 | @click.option("-f", "--force", is_flag=True, help="Auto-unassign oldest branch if pool is full") |
E501 Line too long (103 > 100) --> tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py:174:101 | 173 | with patch.dict(os.environ, {"ERK_SHELL": "zsh"}): 174 | result = runner.invoke(branch_group, ["checkout", "--new-slot", "feature-branch"], obj=ctx) | ^^^ 175 | 176 | assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" |
E501 Line too long (106 > 100) --> tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py:257:101 | 256 | with patch.dict(os.environ, {"ERK_SHELL": "zsh"}): 257 | result = runner.invoke(branch_group, ["checkout", "--new-slot", "reuse-slot-branch"], obj=ctx) | ^^^^^^ 258 | 259 | assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}"
... [43 lines omitted] ...
347 | assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 528 | assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 584 | assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" Found 7 errors.
session.assistant:
ruff failed: 7 line-too-long errors found
Summary: Found 7 E501 (line too long) violations across 2 files.
**Details:**
1. `src/erk/cli/commands/branch/checkout_cmd.py:457:101` - Line 457 exceeds 100 character limit by 13 characters (113 total) - Issue: Help text for `--new-slot` option is too long
2. `tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py:174:101` - Line 174 exceeds limit by 3 characters (103 total) - Issue: Test invocation line is too long
3. `tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py:257:101` - Line 257 exceeds limit by 6 characters (106 total) - Issue: Test invocation line is too long
4. `tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py:345:101` - Line 345 exceeds limit by 12 characters (112 total) - Issue: Test invocation line is too long
5. `tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py:526:101` - Line 526 exceeds limit by 1 character (101 total) - Issue: Test invocation line is too long
6. `tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py:582:101` - Line 582 exceeds limit by 2 characters (102 total) - Issue: Test invocation line is too long
7. `tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py:642:101` - Line 642 exceeds limit by 2 characters (102 total) - Issue: Test invocation line is too long
All violations are E501 (line too long). The test file has 6 violations, and the command file has 1 violation.
